message:
refactor(tests): improve test patterns and remove redundant scope blocks

Merge resolution incorporating upstream improvements with style cleanups:

builder.rs:
- Add compile-time Clone trait assertion helper (assert_clone<T: Clone>)
- Now verifies Clone at compile time AND tests runtime behavior of both
  original builder and its clone, providing stronger guarantees

notify.rs:
- Remove 4 unnecessary scope blocks around lock acquisitions in tests
- The MutexGuard is immediately consumed by .entries.len() so the
  explicit scope blocks were redundant - the lock is released at
  statement end regardless
- Cleaner, more idiomatic Rust test code

These changes were merged from parallel agent work during sync, combining
the best of both the upstream runtime verification and local style
improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
